label: Snapchat
description: Snapchat Web, boxed into a Meridian NetBrowse instance pinned to this section. Log in same as any browser (note: Snapchat Web has fewer features than the phone app - no Snap camera). Uses Meridian NetBrowse's virtual mouse (A: left click, B: right click), Start: on-screen keyboard, and a stripped-down menu with only Exit Program.
